message:
feat(ansi): Extend ANSI output with writer helpers and escapes

ansi/output.rs:
- Add structured ANSI writer for building escape sequences
- Support for cursor movement, SGR attributes, colors
- Buffer-based approach for efficient sequence generation

ansi/mod.rs:
- Export new output module
- Consolidate ANSI functionality under single namespace

ansi/sequences.rs:
- Additional sequence constants for less common operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
